hero.about: I build modern, scalable web applications with a focus on clean code, performance and great user experience.

projects.project1: Fullstack task management application with kanban board, team workspace and real-time updates.
projects.project2: AI-Powered application for generating marketing content, product descriptions and social media posts.
projects.project3: Modern chat application with real-time messaging, responsive interface and seamless user communication.

about_me.text1: I'm a fullstack developer with a strong focus on React and Node.js. I enjoy turning ideas into real that solve problems and deliver value.
about_me.text2: I'm continuously learning new technologies and improving my skills to build better applications.
